meaning: n.旅行,游历,旅游v.旅行,游历,巡回,漫游
examples: The band will be going on tour.
The band is on tour in France.
They went to Italy on a coach tour.
In the tour we show them proudly the way the people in Kibera live.
Lieutenant Colonel Greg Butts(ph), a battalion commander for the 101st Airborne Division, gives a driving tour.
